summary: Forensic UX Audit of Production BIQc (biqc.thestrategysquad.com) - Soundboard & Onboarding Flows. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Session persistence issues cause repeated logouts during page navigation. Unable to fully test Soundboard due to session drops.

tests_performed.test1_soundboard_via_magic_link: BLOCKED - Magic link token expired/one-time use
tests_performed.test2_signup_and_onboarding: PARTIAL - Signup successful but session lost during calibration flow
tests_performed.soundboard_testing: BLOCKED - Session persistence bug prevents sustained testing

critical.description: After successful login, navigating to any page (e.g., /soundboard, /calibration) results in session being dropped and redirect to /login-supabase within 2-5 seconds
reproduction_steps: 3. Wait 3-5 seconds OR attempt to navigate to /soundboard
critical.suspected_cause: Supabase auth token refresh race condition OR localStorage session not being persisted/read correctly

critical.issue: cognitive_profiles RLS policy violation during signup
critical.console_error: [signUp] cognitive_profiles upsert failed: new row violates row-level security policy for table 'cognitive_profiles'
critical.impact: Error logged but signup completes - may cause incomplete user profile setup

integration_issues.issue: Session token not maintained across page navigation

positive: Clean, modern design with dark theme
Clear form fields with helpful placeholders
Industry field allows free text entry (good flexibility)
Sovereign Intelligence value props displayed on right panel
Link to sign up from login page

issues.issue: Password minimum is 6 characters (industry standard is 8+)
issues.recommendation: Increase minimum password length to 8 characters for security

issues.issue: Industry field is free-text - could benefit from autocomplete/suggestions
issues.recommendation: Add ANZSIC industry dropdown with search

observed_before_session_drop: Welcome screen with personalized greeting (user's first name)
Clean intro explaining the system is 'not a dashboard'
findings.blocking_issue: Session drops before calibration flow can be completed

ux_audit_soundboard_page.overall_score: PARTIAL - Session drops prevent full testing

observed_elements: PASS: No API key prompts displayed (confirmed)
MySoundBoard header with 'Your thinking partner for clarity' subtitle
Message input: 'Share what's on your mind...'
Explainability strip with 4 sections: WHY YOU ARE SEEING THIS, WHY THIS MATTERS NOW, WHAT TO DO NEXT, IF IGNORED
Welcome AI message: 'Cal, I'm your Strategic Intelligence Advisor...'

positive: Concise 4-bullet explanation of how BIQc works
'Data hosted exclusively in Sydney & Melbourne' trust badge
Clear CTA: 'Connect Email to Get Started'
Skip option available: 'Skip for now - I'll connect later'

issues.issue: Modal covers important content behind it
issues.recommendation: Consider a non-modal onboarding or step-by-step tour

test_credentials_created.status: Account created successfully, requires email verification

existing_qa_credentials_used.status: Login successful but session drops after navigation

action_items.item: Fix session persistence bug on production - users cannot maintain authenticated sessions
action_items.suspected_root_cause: Supabase auth state not being maintained across React Router navigation OR localStorage session corruption

action_items.item: Fix cognitive_profiles RLS policy to allow new user inserts during signup
Investigate Andre magic link - provide fresh one-time link for testing paid user flows

context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL: Production has session persistence bug. After login, session drops within seconds when navigating pages. Unable to test Soundboard prompt handling, calibration flow, or any authenticated features. The bug appears to be related to Supabase auth token not persisting across React Router navigation. Recommend debugging SupabaseAuthContext.js and checking localStorage/sessionStorage token handling. Test credentials: cal-loop-416d7f85@biqctest.io / BIQcTest!2026Z

rca_of_issue.problem: Session persistence failure on production biqc.thestrategysquad.com
symptoms: User logs in successfully, redirected to /advisor
Within 2-5 seconds of any navigation or page interaction, session is lost
Pattern repeats consistently across multiple test runs
potential_causes: 1. Supabase auth token refresh timing issue - token expires before refresh
2. React Router unmounting auth context during navigation
3. localStorage/sessionStorage race condition - token not being persisted
4. CORS or cookie issues on production domain
5. Auth state change listener firing SIGNED_OUT incorrectly
files_to_investigate: Backend auth middleware for token validation
recommended_debugging_steps: 1. Add console logs to onAuthStateChange listener in SupabaseAuthContext
2. Check browser DevTools > Application > Local Storage for token persistence
3. Monitor Network tab for auth refresh requests during navigation
4. Verify detectSessionInUrl and persistSession settings in Supabase client config
